ROOM 220 JUDGE LUCY KELLY MCCABE, GGOROSIN, CLERK, REPORTER WAIVED. 2:20 PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. RICHARD ALEXANDER APPEARING FOR PLTFS, DEFT HODARI JAMES DEE PRESENT & APPEARING IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED, TERMS CONTAINED IN A DOCUMENT ENTITLED JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION SIGNED BY DEFT AND SUBMITTED TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE AND SIGNED BY JUDGE MCCABE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEE, HODARI JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 225 HYDE STREET, APARTMENT #419, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,935.87 RENT, $490.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $138.97 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,564.84, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILED TERMS OF THE STIPULATION.
